violations.text: The floor has an small accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

A box of Shitake Mushrooms was observed with rodent gnawing marks and droppings. One bag was observed with gnaw marks. PIC voluntarily disposed of entire box. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by gnawed product and new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The shelving in the back storage area was observed with droppings. Product to be pulled off of shelves and shelving to be cleaned. PIC to monitor shelving daily for new activity. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Rodent droppings were observed under the middle of shelving in the retail area and on the floor in the side storage room. Areas to be fully cleaned and monitored for new activity. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of droppings in various locations of establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is using pest control 1x monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
Three dead rodents were observed in various spots of the establishment. PIC disposed of rodents at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The shelving in the back storage area was observed with droppings. Product to be pulled off of shelves and shelving to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Rodent droppings were observed under shelving in the retail area and on the floor in the side storage room. Areas to be fully cleaned and monitored for new activity. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The bathroom is lacking a hand-washing sink. PIC stated that hand sink is in the process of getting plumbed in. (Plumbing observed at the time of inspection.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The floors in the establishment has an accumulation of soil rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The bathroom is lacking a hand-washing sink. PIC stated new hand sink will be added by this week. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The floor in the retail area and back storage area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The bathroom is lacking a hand-washing sink. PIC stated new hand sink will be added by landlord. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

Raw animal foods were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
Rodenticide was observed on the retail floor. PIC cleaned up rodenticide. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

Pork Belly packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large accumulation droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
2 dead rodents were observed on glue traps in the retail area. Rodents were disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The 3 bay sink located in the kitchen area is not in good repair and /or proper adjustment. The faucet doesn't reach all three bays. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Shelving was cleaned at the time of inspection. The non-food contact surfaces of the oven top had an accumulation of grease. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The floors in the retail area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The floor in the retail area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
Boxes of food product were observed stored on the floor throughout the establishment. Food product must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Inspector observed equipment(pots, pans, and bowls)being stored on the floor and soiled wood plank in the ware washing area.PIC instructed to wash rinse, and sanitize equipment and store on a clean surface Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
The 3 bay sink located in the kitchen area is not in good repair and /or proper adjustment. The faucet doesn't reach all three bins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The following equipment have an accumulation debris: 1.stoves observed with grease, food and soil residue. 2.chest freezer lid observed with dust, dirt, and rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

The floors in walk in cooler and under equipment throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2023

Pre packaged rice cakes was observed on a retail shelf held at 78 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC informed refrigerated products need to be stored in refrigeration units.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC to maintain current PCS and provide inspector with proof of services. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
Boxes of various food product were observed stored on the floor throughout the establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Inspector observed equipment(pots, pans, and bowls)be stored on floor and wood plank in ware washing area.PIC instructed to wash, rinse, and sanitize equipment and store properly on a clean surface. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023
The 3 bay sink located in the kitchen area was not in good repair and/or proper adjustment. The faucet does not reach all three bins. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023

The following equipment have an accumulation debris: 1.stoves observed with food residue, grease, and soil residue 2.chest freezer lid observed with dust, dirt, and rodent droppings. 3.storage shelves in walk in freezer has an accumulation of food debris New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

The floors under equipment, walk in cooler, and throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2023
